# Vendored Dependencies for renderkind
# Last updated: 2026-04-14
# See CONTRIBUTING.md for vendoring policy

## submodule1 (https://github.com/bkuz114/template_utils)
- Version: 0.2.0 (commit abc123def456)
- Original license: MIT
- Files vendored:
  - template_utils.py → submodule1_parser.py
- Modifications: None (vendored as-is)
- Reason: Provides markdown AST parsing; only the parser is needed, not the full library

## submodule2 (https://github.com/bkuz114/themePicker)
- Version: 1.0.4 (commit 789xyz012)
- Original license: BSD 3-Clause
- Files vendored:
  - themePicker.js → assets/js/themePicker.js
- Modifications: None (vendored as-is)
- Reason: HTML rendering logic; CLI tool only uses the renderer, not the bundler or watcher

## Vendor Maintenance Notes
- To update: cd ../submodule1 && git pull && cp core/parser.py ../renderkind/src/renderkind/vendor/
- Run tests after any vendored update
- Do not edit vendored files directly; modify source and re-vendor
